network_type: BLE (commissioning) / Proprietary wireless mesh (Secure or Non-Secure) on channel 15, 20, 25, or 26

commissioning_app_menus.main_menu: Form a network, pair devices, use CLI commands.
commissioning_app_menus.standard_menu: Discover info such as site name, room name, MQTT server, and time zone.
commissioning_app_menus.advanced_menu: Discover WPA2 user and password fields to utilize a WPA2 enterprise network; scroll down for the provision key.
commissioning_app_menus.ellipsis_icon: Menu options change based on the current screen (e.g. 'Set Customer Settings', enter Advanced Mode for CLI commands).
commissioning_app_menus.disconnect: Disconnect the thermostat from the commissioning app.

pre_installation_checks: Contact your Project Manager to obtain Rhapsody login credentials.
Download the Rhapsody Commissioning App to an iPhone or Android device.
Allow Rhapsody to find Bluetooth devices and use device location.
Log in to the app using your email address and Rhapsody password.
Install Touch Combo thermostats per the Touch Combo IOM, and other VDA/Telkonet devices per the EcoContact+ IOM / EcoSense+ IOM before commissioning.
If applicable, obtain a list of PMS (property management system) room names from the Project Manager or Certified Partner.
put_thermostat_in_ble_mode: Three-finger tap anywhere on the thermostat screen.
Enter the password provided by the Telkonet Project Manager, then tap 'Enter'.
The 'Ready for BLE' screen appears - thermostat is now in BLE setup mode.
Tapping 'Cancel' while in BLE setup mode exits the mode.
commission_touch_combo_thermostat: With the thermostat nearby and already in BLE mode, open the Rhapsody Commissioning App.
Tap on the correct thermostat from the discovered devices list (verify it's the right one if multiple are being commissioned simultaneously).
On the Device Setup screen, select the customer's property in the 'Customer Template' dropdown.
Tap the Ellipsis icon in the upper right corner, then tap 'Set Customer Settings' to apply customer settings.

Enter the Room name. If a Rhapsody/PMS interface will be used, enter the room number exactly as it appears in the PMS room list, starting with the number; append a brief location descriptor after a space if needed (e.g. '101 BR1'). Do not use dashes, commas, or other symbols.
A 'Settings applied' confirmation message appears - the thermostat is now commissioned.
If there are no devices to pair, take the thermostat out of BLE mode and move on to the next thermostat.
form_network: At the bottom of the screen, tap 'Form Network'.
Select Secure or Non-Secure (contact your Project Manager if unsure).
Select a Network channel: 15, 20, 25, or 26 - ensure other nearby devices are not on the same channel.
The Activity Log displays 'Success'; close the Activity Log.
pair_contact_plus: Put the thermostat in BLE mode.
On the Pairing screen, tap the Devices Menu, then select 'Add device'.
Enter the slot number (1, 2, 3, etc. for first, second, third device paired).
Set Secure/Non-secure, Polarity, Special Function, and Door/Window or Lanai (contact Project Manager if unsure of any).
On the Contact+, press the Join/Bind button four times; the app displays a pairing countdown.
Tap the Activity Log at the bottom of the screen to confirm 'Device add completed'.
identify_contact_plus_targets: Note which targets the sensor and magnet should use (some have two targets).
Using the straight end of the extractor tool, a paperclip, or similar, press the EcoContact+ sensor button 8 times; the LED blinks twice.
Touch the sensor's target to the magnet's target. Release when you hear three single beeps (side target) or three double beeps (top target).
Tap the Activity Log to confirm 'Device add completed'.
pair_sense_plus: On the Pairing screen, tap the Devices Menu, then select 'Add device'.
Enter the slot number and Room name.
Set Secure/Non-secure, Polarity, and Special Function (Door/Window or Lanai is n/a for Sense+).
On the Sense+, press the join/bind tab four times (with cover on or off); the app displays a pairing countdown.
Tap the Activity Log to confirm 'Device add completed'.
pair_ving_door_lock: On the Pairing screen, tap the Devices Menu, then select 'Add device'.
Enter the slot number and Room name.
Set Secure/Non-secure, Polarity, and Special Function (Door/Window or Lanai is n/a for Ving).
On the Ving door lock, tap the Discovery Card to the Ving card reader, then tap the EMS Card to the card reader.
The app displays a pairing countdown.
Tap the Activity Log to confirm 'Device add completed'.
test_ving_pairing_debug: After joining the Ving lock, always debug (test the connection) before leaving to confirm the lock is sending messages.
Tap the Ellipsis button in the upper right to enter Advanced Mode.
Type the command 'ving debug 1' and tap Enter.
Lock/unlock the deadbolt or swipe a Staff card to generate an event.
Confirm a corresponding event message appears in the log; this message is required for integration with the Visionline Lock service.
If no event message appears, swipe the EMI card at the lock reader and try again.
Once testing is complete, turn off debugging by entering 'ving debug 0' and tapping Enter.
take_touch_combo_out_of_ble_mode: On the Touch Combo, tap the 'Cancel' button.
Tap the back button repeatedly until returning to the main thermostat screen.

device_types.Contact+: Door/window/lanai magnetic contact sensor (EcoContact+); has configurable Polarity, Special Function, and Door/Window or Lanai settings.
device_types.Sense+: Occupancy/environmental sensor (EcoSense+); Door/Window or Lanai setting is not applicable.
device_types.Ving: VingCard-compatible door lock integration; Door/Window or Lanai setting is not applicable; requires Discovery Card and EMS Card presentation to pair, and a 'ving debug' CLI test before leaving site.

cli_commands.ving debug 1: Enable debug logging on the Ving lock integration to verify event messages during testing.
cli_commands.ving debug 0: Disable debug logging on the Ving lock integration once testing is complete.

troubleshooting.wifi_and_network_troubleshooting: Available on thermostats with host firmware higher than v1.4.2.1. Access via: three-finger tap on thermostat screen > Config > enter password > Wi-Fi. The Wi-Fi Status screen displays one of the defined status values (see wifi_status_values) at the bottom of the screen to identify where the connection is failing.
troubleshooting.ving_lock_no_event_message: If no event message appears after locking/unlocking or swiping a Staff card during 'ving debug 1' testing, swipe the EMI card at the lock reader and try the event again.
troubleshooting.wrong_thermostat_selected_during_commiss: If multiple nearby thermostats are being commissioned simultaneously, more than one may appear in the Rhapsody app discovery list - verify the correct thermostat is selected before tapping it.
troubleshooting.channel_conflicts_during_form_network: Ensure other nearby devices/networks are not already using the same Network channel (15, 20, 25, or 26) selected during Form Network.
troubleshooting.wired_dry_contact_input: TBD - not yet documented in this version of the guide (Appendix 1).
